description: M8A existing-plan manifest replay fixture — 8-task representative plan with mixed dependency structure representing a previously finalized plan. Replay must be byte-stable: compile twice and assert identical task_contract_hash, seriality, critical_path, max_width, and unchanged fixture bytes.

tasks.objective: Audit existing finalized plan artifacts for immutability.
tasks.description: Verify that all finalized plan artifacts under .megaplan/plans/ have not been modified since finalization.
tasks.complexity_justification: Read-only audit of existing files with hash comparison.

tasks.objective: Compile report-only feasibility diagnostics for existing plans.
tasks.description: Run the feasibility compiler in report-only mode against existing finalized plans and record diagnostics without mutating artifacts.
tasks.complexity_justification: Report-only compilation requires careful handling to avoid writes to historical plan directories.

E1.reason: E2 requires the audit results to identify which plans need feasibility diagnostics.

tasks.objective: Validate task contract hashes for existing plans.
tasks.description: Recompute task contract hashes for all existing finalized plans and verify they match the stored hashes.
tasks.complexity_justification: Hash recomputation and comparison against stored values.

E2.reason: E3 uses the feasibility diagnostics to identify which plans need hash validation.

tasks.objective: Extract seriality and critical path metrics for existing plans.
tasks.description: Compute seriality ratios, critical path lengths, and max widths for all existing plans without modifying them.
tasks.complexity_justification: Metric computation from existing plan data with no mutation.

tasks.objective: Compute batch width and dispatch estimates for existing plans.
tasks.description: Calculate maximum batch width and estimated dispatch minutes for all existing plans from their task graphs.
tasks.complexity_justification: Batch topology computation from existing task graphs.

tasks.objective: Merge metrics into unified existing-plan report.
tasks.description: Combine seriality, batch, and feasibility metrics into a single report for each existing plan.
tasks.complexity_justification: Metric aggregation from two independent computation results.

E4.reason: E6 requires seriality metrics to include in the unified report.

E5.reason: E6 requires batch metrics to include in the unified report.

tasks.description: Produce a baseline manifest recording all existing plan hashes, metrics, and diagnostics for future replay comparison.
tasks.complexity_justification: Manifest generation from aggregated metrics with content addressing.

E3.reason: E7 requires contract hash validation results for the baseline manifest.

E6.reason: E7 requires unified metrics for the baseline manifest.

tasks.objective: Verify report-only outputs never wrote to historical plan directories.
tasks.description: Run a final audit confirming that all report-only replay outputs went to temp or evidence directories, never to .megaplan/plans/.
tasks.complexity_justification: Requires filesystem traversal and verification that no historical plan artifacts were touched.

E7.reason: E8 uses the baseline manifest to verify all outputs are accounted for in non-historical directories.
